testcase.name: browserSetup

error.message: element click intercepted: Element <button id="alertBox" onclick="alertFunction()">...</button> is not clickable at point (81, 465). Other element would receive the click: <iframe id="aswift_2" name="aswift_2" style="min-height: auto; max-height: none; min-width: auto; max-width: none; width: 1005px !important; height: 142px !important;
